title: Landed in Osaka!
note: First steps in Japan — the castle grounds were so green and the sky building view at sunset was unreal.

title: USJ was worth every step
note: Super Nintendo World felt like walking into a game. Legs are dead but so happy.

title: Bamboo grove & matcha everything
note: Arashiyama in the morning light was so peaceful. Uji matcha soft serve might be the best thing we've eaten.

title: Boathouses of Ine
note: Ine felt like a hidden postcard town. The bay cruise breeze was the perfect break from the heat.

title: Kobe beef & harbor sunset
note: Splurged on Kobe beef and it melted in our mouths. Watched the sunset over Harborland — a top trip moment.
